title: Happy Students
titleCn: 让所有学生保持开心的分组方法数

testcases.input: nums = [1,1] Output: 2 Explanation: The two possible ways are: The class teacher selects no student. The class teacher selects both students to form the group. If the class teacher selects just one student to form a group then the both students will not be happy. Therefore, there are only two possible ways.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The two possible ways are: The class teacher selects no student. The class teacher selects both students to form the group. If the class teacher selects just one student to form a group then the both students will not be happy. Therefore, there are only two possible ways.

testcases.input: nums = [6,0,3,3,6,7,2,7] Output: 3 Explanation: The three possible ways are: The class teacher selects the student with index = 1 to form the group. The class teacher selects the students with index = 1, 2, 3, 6 to form the group. The class teacher selects all the students to form the group.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The three possible ways are: The class teacher selects the student with index = 1 to form the group. The class teacher selects the students with index = 1, 2, 3, 6 to form the group. The class teacher selects all the students to form the group.
